title: Fix PerfectScrollbar Initialization Error
description:
Fix a JavaScript error where PerfectScrollbar initialization fails because no element is specified. The error originates in `argon-dashboard.js` at the custom.js module.

## Error
```
Uncaught Error: no element is specified to initialize PerfectScrollbar
    at new PerfectScrollbar (argon-dashboard.js:21411)
    at ./resources/js/custom.js (argon-dashboard.js:2252)
```

The PerfectScrollbar library is being initialized on a DOM element that doesn't exist on the current page.
acceptance_criteria: PerfectScrollbar initialization error no longer appears in the browser console
Scrollbar functionality works correctly on pages that have the target element
implementation_notes: Added a null check before initializing PerfectScrollbar to prevent the error on pages where the target element doesn't exist.
comment_summary: Developer fixed and submitted for review.
